title: Really slow Monday v2 APIs using Node.js
excerpt:
Hi all, 
we perform some queries and mutations using Monday SDK on Node.js in an app installed on Firebase. 
We are experiencing extreme slowness. 
A simple webhook request -> Monday query -> some calculations -> Monday …

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,
we perform some queries and mutations using Monday SDK on Node.js in an app installed on Firebase.
We are experiencing extreme slowness.
A simple webhook request -> Monday query -> some calculations -> Monday mutation can take several seconds (sometimes more than 10 seconds) from when the user changes a value in a board using his browser and sees the changes.
In our logs we see that a single query can take 2 or 3 seconds to retrieve a result.
Any hints on how to improve speed?

Thanks for your help.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there @rob!

I sincerely apologize for our delay on getting back to you here!

Just to clarify, are you still having this issue? Would it be possible for you to reach out to us over at support@monday.com instead so we can take a further look at your code and discuss what might be the root cause of the slowness here?

-Alex

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @AlexSavchuk.
I confirm the problem is still here.
I’ve just informed @moshik that we are experiencing heavy delays (20+ secs) between a change performed by the client and the update performed by our app.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@rob Thanks so much for keeping me in the loop here! Let’s hope @moshik will be able to figure out the root cause here, I will be keeping an eye on this thread personally too.

-Alex
